title: hyptis rugosa var. incisa
intro: Hyptis rugosa var. incisa, also known as narrow-leaf hyptis, is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hyptis rugosa var. incisa include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
